policy: permit(principal, action, resource) when { decimal("0.0").lessThan(decimal("-0.0")) || decimal("-0.0").lessThan(decimal("0.0")) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z") < datetime("2025-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-01-01T00:00:00Z") > datetime("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00Z") == datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00Z") != datetime("2024-04-25T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { duration("1d") < duration("2d") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { duration("2d") > duration("1d") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { duration("24h") == duration("24h") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2024-02-29T00:00:00Z") < datetime("2024-03-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2023-02-28T00:00:00Z") < datetime("2023-03-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.001Z") > datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.000Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.1234Z") > datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.000Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T12:00:00+05:00") < datetime("2025-04-25T12:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T12:00:00-05:00") > datetime("2025-04-25T12:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("1969-12-31T23:59:59Z") < datetime("1970-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2099-12-31T23:59:59Z") > datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true || false && false };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { false && true || true };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { if true then true else false };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { if (if true then false else true) then false else true };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { if false then true else false };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { false && ip("fe80::1%eth0").isIpv6() };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true || ip("fe80::1%eth0").isIpv6() };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true && ip("fe80::1%eth0").isIpv6() };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { false && decimal("+1.0").lessThan(decimal("2.0")) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true || decimal("+1.0").lessThan(decimal("2.0")) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true && decimal("+1.0").lessThan(decimal("2.0")) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { false && datetime("invalid-date") < datetime("2025-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true || datetime("invalid-date") < datetime("2025-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal in Group::"users" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal in Group::"admins" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { User::"bob" in Group::"admins" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { User::"carol" in Group::"viewers" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is User };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is Group };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { resource is Document };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { resource is Photo };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is User && principal in Group::"users" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is User && principal in Group::"admins" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal in [User::"alice", User::"bob"] };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { action in [Action::"view", Action::"edit"] };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { action in [Action::"admin"] };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { User::"alice" in Group::"users" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { !(User::"alice" in Group::"admins") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { resource in [Document::"doc1", Document::"doc2"] };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { resource in [Document::"doc2"] };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { !(principal is Group) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is User && resource is Document && action == Action::"view" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { {"key": true} has key };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { {"key": true} has missing_key };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { {"outer": {"inner": true}}.outer has inner };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { {"a": {"b": {"c": 42}}}.a.b has c };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { {} has key };

permit(principal, action, resource);
forbid(principal, action, resource);

permit(principal == User::"alice", action, resource);
permit(principal == User::"bob", action, resource);

permit(principal == User::"carol", action, resource);
permit(principal == User::"bob", action, resource);

permit(principal, action, resource);
forbid(principal, action == Action::"admin", resource);

permit(principal == User::"alice", action == Action::"view", resource == Document::"doc1");
forbid(principal, action, resource);

permit(principal, action, resource);
forbid(principal, action, resource is Photo);

permit(principal, action, resource) when { action == Action::"view" };
forbid(principal, action, resource) when { resource == Document::"doc2" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true && true };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true && false };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { false || false };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { false || true };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal has nonexistent_attr };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { context has any_key };
permit(principal == User::"alice", action == Action::"view", resource == Document::"doc1");
permit(principal == User::"alice", action == Action::"view", resource == Document::"doc2");

permit(principal, action, resource);
forbid(principal, action == Action::"view", resource);

permit(principal, action, resource);
forbid(principal, action == Action::"admin", resource);
permit(principal, action, resource) when { duration("1h") < duration("2h") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { duration("3600s") == duration("1h") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { duration("1000ms") == duration("1s") };
